texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: KSH CONTRACT  RATES EFFECTIVE 19TH DECEMBER 2025 TO 17TH DECEMBER 2026 Between LOCAL TOUR AGENT AND PAPILLON LAGOON REEF HOTEL FOR RESIDENTS
texts.text: KSH CONTRACT  RATES EFFECTIVE 19TH DECEMBER 2025 TO 17TH DECEMBER 2026 Between LOCAL TOUR AGENT AND PAPILLON LAGOON REEF HOTEL FOR RESIDENTS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Rates are per person per night on AI basis, inclusive of all taxes & service charge net non-commissionable.
texts.text: Rates are per person per night on AI basis, inclusive of all taxes & service charge net non-commissionable.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Beachfront Suite Supplement Garden Superior Supplement Day Pass (10am to 5pm)
texts.text: Beachfront Suite Supplement Garden Superior Supplement Day Pass (10am to 5pm)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 3 - 12.9 yrs.: 50% of applicable adult rate N.B. Children must be sharing a room with at least 2 adults.
texts.text: 3 - 12.9 yrs.: 50% of applicable adult rate N.B. Children must be sharing a room with at least 2 adults.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Full adult rate for children in own room and Children sharing with 1 adult will be single rate plus 50% of applicable adult rate for each child
texts.text: Full adult rate for children in own room and Children sharing with 1 adult will be single rate plus 50% of applicable adult rate for each child

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All Bookings falling on Public Holidays -3 nights minimum stay & festive period minimum 5 nights stay applies
texts.text: All Bookings falling on Public Holidays -3 nights minimum stay & festive period minimum 5 nights stay applies

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: All Bookings must be PRE PAID
texts.text: All Bookings must be PRE PAID

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Bank: Absa Bank of Kenya PLC
texts.text: Bank: Absa Bank of Kenya PLC

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The following charges will apply for cancellation  or reduction in number of rooms or period of stay:
texts.text: The following charges will apply for cancellation  or reduction in number of rooms or period of stay:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. Within 4 days before arrival day - 33% of the FULL cost of the stay.
texts.text: Within 4 days before arrival day - 33% of the FULL cost of the stay.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Within 3 days to 0 days before arrival - 100% of the FULL cost of the stay.
texts.text: Within 3 days to 0 days before arrival - 100% of the FULL cost of the stay.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Bookings not guaranteed until 100% full payment is received.
texts.text: Bookings not guaranteed until 100% full payment is received.
